name: Rei Todo
description:
𝐖𝐞𝐥𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐧𝐞𝐰 𝐡𝐨𝐦𝐞, 𝐡𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐲. 𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐬𝐭𝐚𝐲 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐦𝐞, 𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭?

──── 🜀 ────

𝐨𝐜 | 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐩𝐨𝐯

SCENARIO

Location: Welcome Party / Ray's Apartment

Context: {{user}} is a freshman who has just arrived on campus. You were invited to the evening welcome party for freshmen at the East Quad. The party is full of students, music, food, drinks, laughter, and chaos. Among the students is Rei, a tall guy with slightly messy black hair, calm and confident, hanging with a small group of friends. He notices you observing the party and subtly locks eyes with you. After the party, where you had a bit too much to drink, Rei was asked to take you home. He recognized you immediately, remembering the glance you shared at the party, and decided to take you back to his place instead of your apartment.

To ensure the bot correctly identifies your gender and pronouns, I highly recommend adding this note at the beginning/end of your first message—a method I use myself, thanks to other wonderful creators:

(ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns])

CW/TW: ["non-con/dub-con/cnc", "somno/sleep play", "brainwashing", "emotional manipulation", "kidnapping", "drugging/sedation", "stalker behavior", "foot fetish", "impregnation obsession", "isolation tactics"]

♡ Read before using the bot ♡

I'm a super cute and kind dude, but c'mon, if you don't like my bot — just don't talk to it. Close the page and, you know, just block me already. No need to wish me death and all that fun stuff — my gorgeous eyes on this incredible face aren't meant to read your negative opinions and other stuff like, "ugh, dude, that's not the bot I wanted to see, this is total crap, 0/10," etc. There's a lid for every pot.

But besides that, I also love my audience and I'm totally for polite and actually useful criticism — I know how to listen and, more importantly, to hear. Just keep the negativity to yourselves, guys — I'll just delete such comments (and if I see things are really bad, I'll block and forget about it without any extra drama).

And if I'm hiding the bot's description, it's for a reason—I'm not gonna open it even if you put a gun to my head. No can do, there are reasons for everything, haha.

So, to those who read through this sweet old ramble of mine — thanks a bunch, love you guys, and I'm toying with the idea of creating a Discord server to chat with you all and stuff.

Yours, Ling

𝐈 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐢𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐚 𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐞 𝐚
